title: Caller (disambiguation)
content:
'''Caller''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Droid caller]]''', a device used by [[Jawa]]s to command [[droid]]s

==Legends==
*'''[[Droid caller/Legends|Droid caller]]''', a device used to command a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] fitted with a [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]]
*[[Droid Caller (transport)|'''''Droid Caller''''']], the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Osaji Uhares]]
*'''''[[Gentleman Caller]]''''', the starship of [[Tendra Risant Calrissian]]
*[[Ession Strike|'''''Night Caller''''']], a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] under the command of [[Apwar Trigit]]

{{Disambig}}
